channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16289] replay-single test_70d: dirstripe error on '/mnt/lustre/d70d.replay-single/test': Input/output error
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Vitaly Fertman <vitaly_fertman@xyratex.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/a09be223-b096-4319-9fe0-8b024ca17507

test_70d failed with the following error:

lfs mkdir: dirstripe error on '/mnt/lustre/d70d.replay-single/test': Input/output error
lfs setdirstripe: cannot create dir '/mnt/lustre/d70d.replay-single/test': Input/output error
mkdir fails
pdsh@onyx-25vm1: onyx-25vm1: ssh exited with exit code 5
CMD: onyx-25vm1.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-25vm2 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config bash rpc.sh wait_import_state_mount \(FULL\|IDLE\) mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid 
onyx-25vm1: onyx-25vm1.onyx.whamcloud.com: executing wait_import_state_mount (FULL|IDLE) mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid
onyx-25vm2: onyx-25vm2.onyx.whamcloud.com: executing wait_import_state_mount (FULL|IDLE) mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid
onyx-25vm1: CMD: onyx-25vm1.onyx.whamcloud.com lctl get_param -n at_max
onyx-25vm1: mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid in FULL state after 0 sec
onyx-25vm2: CMD: onyx-25vm2.onyx.whamcloud.com lctl get_param -n at_max
onyx-25vm2: mdc.lustre-MDT0000-mdc-*.mds_server_uuid in FULL state after 0 sec
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/replay-single.sh: line 2283: kill: (226799) - No such process
 replay-single test_70d: @@@@@@ FAIL: mkdir/rmdir 226799 stopped

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
replay-single test_70d - mkdir/rmdir 226799 stopped
item.summary: replay-single test_70d: dirstripe error on '/mnt/lustre/d70d.replay-single/test': Input/output error

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
